# MDE v1.2.16

## Features

- None.

## Bug Fixes

- Fixed the editor Undo behavior immediately after opening a Markdown file. Pressing `Cmd+Z` or `Ctrl+Z` before making edits no longer clears the loaded document.
- Kept Markdown hydration out of the BlockNote/ProseMirror undo history by applying imported blocks with `addToHistory=false`.
- Covered the same Undo behavior after switching from one Markdown file to another, so hydration remains safe across file changes.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Added a focused editor hydration helper for replacing imported Markdown content without creating an undo step.
- Added unit coverage for the Markdown editor hydration path.
- Added integration coverage for the hydration helper transaction metadata.
- Added E2E coverage for immediate Undo after first opening a file and after switching to another file.
- Updated completed requirement and bug documents with release status notes and moved finished items into `docs/requirements/done/` and `docs/bugs/done/`.
- Updated `AGENTS.md` so future released requirements and bugs are documented and moved into the matching `done` directory.
- Updated `package.json` and `package-lock.json` to version `1.2.16`.

## Verification

- `npm run lint`
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm run test:unit`
- `npm run test:integration`
- `npm run test:e2e -- tests/e2e/markdown-editor.e2e.test.ts -g "keeps loaded markdown intact"`
- `npm run test:e2e`

## Artifacts

- macOS DMG and ZIP for Apple Silicon and Intel.
- Windows NSIS installer for x64.
